title: BRIC THSTI Apprentice Vacancy 2026, Notification Out, Apply Online -
how_to_apply: Visit the official website Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position. Upload required documents: Photograph (JPG, max 50KB), Signature (JPG, max 20KB), Educational Certificates, ID Proof, Caste Certificate (if applicable). Pay the
jobs_info: BRIC THSTI Apprentice Vacancy 2026: The BRIC-Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (BRIC THSTI) has issued a notification for the position of Apprentice. The recruitment drive comprises 09 vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 02-06-2026, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the BRIC THSTI Apprentice Vacancy 2026 recruitment is provided below.

vacancy_details.eligibility: B.Tech/BE/B.Sc in Life Sciences. Passed within the last five years, with a minimum 55% marks (CGPA 6 and above).

Graduation in Computer Science/Information Technology/Computer Application or allied subjects OR Diploma in IT/Computer Science or Computer Application or allied subjects. Passed within the last five years, with a minimum 55% marks (CGPA 6 and above).
Graduation in Civil Engineering or allied subjects OR Diploma in Engineering (Civil or allied subjects). Passed within the last five years, with a minimum 55% marks (CGPA 6 and above).
Graduation in Electrical/Electronics/Instrumentation Engineering OR Diploma in Engineering (allied subjects). Passed within the last five years, with a minimum 55% marks (CGPA 6 and above).
